items.title: DRAS
items.paragraph1: DRAS Engineers and Contractors is a professional practice firm specializing in Project and Construction Management Services. At our company, we specialize in providing high-quality Construction and Consultancy for residential, commercial, institutional, industrial sheds, and hospitality projects. We take pride & immense satisfaction in providing end-to-end solutions to our clients.

items.title: RESIDENTIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for residential buildings focus on creating comfortable and functional homes, combining quality craftsmanship with a personalized design to meet the unique needs of homeowners.

items.title: COMMERCIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for commercial buildings cater to businesses and organizations, delivering efficient and aesthetically pleasing spaces that promote productivity and leave a lasting impression on clients and customers

items.title: INSTITUTIONAL BUILDING
items.description: We specialize in construction services for institutional buildings such as schools, hospitals, and public facilities, providing safe and welldesigned environments that support the specific needs and activities of these institutions.

items.title: INDUSTRIAL BUILDING
items.description: Our construction services for industrial buildings encompass the design and construction of structures that facilitate manufacturing, storage, and logistical operations, prioritizing functionality, durability, and compliance with industry regulations.

items.client: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LIMITED

cards.title: Construction of RCC Drain, Repairing of Existing drain & Sump Pit at Township Area of WR-1 RHQ, Nagpur

overview.challenge: The existing masonry drain was damaged and required complete dismantling and reconstruction under space constraints.
overview.result: The RCC drain was successfully constructed with improved durability and proper drainage system without affecting operations.

cards.title: Installation Of False Ceiling & Electrification Work of Sabrang Hall at Powergrid Pocket-A, RHQ, Nagpur

overview.challenge: The hall required modern false ceiling installation along with proper electrical setup under tight deadlines.
overview.result: A high-quality ceiling and electrical system was installed, improving aesthetics and functionality.

cards.title: Renovation Of ED Office, Conference Hall & Staff Room On 1st Floor Of Office Building At RHQ Nagpur

overview.challenge: Renovation had to be done without interrupting office work.
overview.result: Modern interiors and efficient layouts were delivered smoothly with zero disruption.

cards.title: Dismantling of existing workstation and floor tiles for installation of new workstation at POWERGRID, Nagpur

overview.challenge: Existing infrastructure required safe dismantling and quick replacement.
overview.result: New workstations were installed efficiently with improved usability and design.

cards.title: Construction work for electrical control center

overview.challenge: Precision construction was required for electrical infrastructure with strict safety standards.
overview.result: A reliable and safe control center was successfully constructed.

overview.challenge: Multiple teams needed coordination for infrastructure setup.
overview.result: Facilities were installed efficiently with proper system integration.

overview.challenge: Balancing aesthetics with functionality was key.
overview.result: A modern office space was delivered with high-quality finishing.

visionary.title: OUR
paragraphs: Mr. Deepanshu Dilipkumar Namdeo founded DRAS ENGINEERS AND CONTRACTORS in 2022, marking the beginning of his entrepreneurial journey.

A B.E. Civil Engineer, Mr. Deepanshu initially gained valuable experience in Planning, Execution, Commercial (client and Sub- subcontractor billing), procurement and contract of Residential Buildings, Commercial Buildings, Industrial Buildings, and Institutional Building.

With a passion for construction and a strong background in the industry, he has embarked on this exciting journey to offer exceptional construction solutions tailored to the unique needs of our clients.

items.title: Vision
items.description: To create Structures that inspire, uplift, and leave a lasting legacy. We envision a future where our work stands as a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence, Quality, and client satisfaction.

items.title: Mission
items.description: To deliver phenomenal construction services, built on integrity, quality, and client satisfaction while fostering long-term relationships with our partners and communities.

items.title: Goal
items.description: We take pride in our attention to detail, adherence to industry standards, and commitment to excellence. Our goal is to deliver projects on time, within budget, and with the highest level of craftsmanship.
